verses.2: They don’t consider in their hearts that I remember all their wickedness.
verses.3: They make the king glad with their wickedness,
verses.5: On the day of our king, the princes made themselves sick with the heat of wine.
verses.6: For they have prepared their heart like an oven,
verses.7: They are all hot as an oven,
verses.8: Ephraim mixes himself among the nations.
verses.10: The pride of Israel testifies to his face;
verses.11: “Ephraim is like an easily deceived dove, without understanding.
verses.12: When they go, I will spread my net on them.
verses.14: They haven’t cried to me with their heart,
verses.15: Though I have taught and strengthened their arms,
verses.16: They return, but not to the Most High.
